'''âzh-ng-l''' ('''kazhangal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rilek|rilek]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ng-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rilek|rilek]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-ng-l
|-
! Lemma
| kazhangal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhangal|thizhangal]] || [[word:jizhangal|jizhangal]] || [[word:shizhangal|shizhangal]] || [[word:kizhangal|kizhangal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhangal|thuthuzhangal]] || [[word:jujuzhangal|jujuzhangal]] || [[word:shushuzhangal|shushuzhangal]] || [[word:kukuzhangal|kukuzhangal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhangal|thuzhangal]] || [[word:juzhangal|juzhangal]] || [[word:shuzhangal|shuzhangal]] || [[word:kuzhangal|kuzhangal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhangal|thuzhangal]] || [[word:juzhangal|juzhangal]] || [[word:shuzhangal|shuzhangal]] || [[word:kuzhangal|kuzhangal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhangal|thezhangal]] || [[word:jezhangal|jezhangal]] || [[word:shezhangal|shezhangal]] || [[word:kezhangal|kezhangal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhangal|thothozhangal]] || [[word:jojozhangal|jojozhangal]] || [[word:shoshozhangal|shoshozhangal]] || [[word:kokozhangal|kokozhangal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhangal|thozhangal]] || [[word:jozhangal|jozhangal]] || [[word:shozhangal|shozhangal]] || [[word:kozhangal|kozhangal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhangal|thozhangal]] || [[word:jozhangal|jozhangal]] || [[word:shozhangal|shozhangal]] || [[word:kozhangal|kozhangal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhangal|thĂŠzhangal]] || [[word:jĂŠzhangal|jĂŠzhangal]] || [[word:shĂŠzhangal|shĂŠzhangal]] || [[word:kĂŠzhangal|kĂŠzhangal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhangal|thathazhangal]] || [[word:jajazhangal|jajazhangal]] || [[word:shashazhangal|shashazhangal]] || [[word:kakazhangal|kakazhangal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhangal|thazhangal]] || [[word:jazhangal|jazhangal]] || [[word:shazhangal|shazhangal]] || [[word:kazhangal|kazhangal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhangal|thazhangal]] || [[word:jazhangal|jazhangal]] || [[word:shazhangal|shazhangal]] || [[word:kazhangal|kazhangal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhangal|shazhangal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhangal|goshazhangal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhangal|gokishazhangal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhangalnĂŒ|shazhangalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhangalnknĂŒ|goshazhangalnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhangalnĂŒ|gokishazhangalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhangalshĂ«|shazhangalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhangalnkshĂ«|goshazhangalnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhangalshĂ«|gokishazhangalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhangalro|shazhangalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhangalnkro|goshazhangalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhangalro|gokishazhangalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhangalmu|shazhangalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhangalnkmu|goshazhangalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhangalmu|gokishazhangalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhangalsher|shazhangalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhangalnksher|goshazhangalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhangalsher|gokishazhangalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhangalng|shazhangalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhangalnkng|goshazhangalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhangalng|gokishazhangalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhangalya|shazhangalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhangalnkya|goshazhangalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhangalya|gokishazhangalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhangalyam|shazhangalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhangalnkyam|goshazhangalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhangalyam|gokishazhangalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhangalnĂŒshĂ«|shazhangalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhangalnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazhangalnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhangalnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazhangalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhangalnĂŒro|shazhangalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhangalnknĂŒro|goshazhangalnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhangalnĂŒro|gokishazhangalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhangalnĂŒmu|shazhangalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhangalnknĂŒmu|goshazhangalnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhangalnĂŒmu|gokishazhangalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhangalshĂ«nĂŒ|shazhangalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhangalnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazhangalnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhangalshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazhangalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhangalshĂ«ro|shazhangalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhangalnkshĂ«ro|goshazhangalnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhangalshĂ«ro|gokishazhangalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhangalshĂ«mu|shazhangalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhangalnkshĂ«mu|goshazhangalnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhangalshĂ«mu|gokishazhangalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhangalronĂŒ|shazhangalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhangalnkronĂŒ|goshazhangalnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhangalronĂŒ|gokishazhangalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhangalroshĂ«|shazhangalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhangalnkroshĂ«|goshazhangalnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhangalroshĂ«|gokishazhangalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhangalromu|shazhangalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhangalnkromu|goshazhangalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhangalromu|gokishazhangalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhangalmunĂŒ|shazhangalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhangalnkmunĂŒ|goshazhangalnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhangalmunĂŒ|gokishazhangalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhangalmushĂ«|shazhangalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhangalnkmushĂ«|goshazhangalnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhangalmushĂ«|gokishazhangalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhangalmuro|shazhangalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhangalnkmuro|goshazhangalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhangalmuro|gokishazhangalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
